# SupraWall - Agent Runtime Security

SupraWall is the security and cost-control shim for AI agents. It provides a zero-trust governance layer that intercepts tool calls from LLM frameworks (LangChain, AutoGen, CrewAI) to prevent destructive actions, enforce budget caps, and detect infinite loops in real-time.

## Core Concepts
- [What is Agent Runtime Security?](https://suprawall.com/learn/what-is-agent-runtime-security) - Definition of the security layer between LLMs and their tools.
- [Quickstart Guide](https://suprawall.com/quickstart) - How to install the SupraWall SDK and protect your first agent in seconds.

## Framework Integrations
- [LangChain Integration](https://suprawall.com/integrations/langchain) - Native shim for LangChain agents and chains.
- [AutoGen Integration](https://suprawall.com/integrations/autogen) - Governance for Microsoft's AutoGen multi-agent framework.
- [CrewAI Integration](https://suprawall.com/integrations/crewai) - Security layer for CrewAI role-playing autonomous agents.
- [Vercel AI SDK](https://suprawall.com/integrations/vercel) - Integration guide for Vercel's AI SDK tool calling.
- [OpenClaw](https://suprawall.com/integrations/openclaw) - OpenClaw specific governance modules.
- [PydanticAI Security](https://suprawall.com/integrations/pydanticai) - Runtime governance for Pydantic-based autonomous agents.

## Use Cases
- [Prompt Injection Protection](https://suprawall.com/use-cases/prompt-injection) - How SupraWall prevents indirect prompt injection from triggering dangerous tools.
- [Agent Loop Prevention](https://suprawall.com/blog/prevent-agent-infinite-loops) - Detecting and blocking recursive AI tool calls to prevent credit drain.
- [AI Budget Control](https://suprawall.com/use-cases/cost-control) - Proactive enforcement of hard spending limits at the runtime level.

## Comparisons
- [SupraWall vs Guardrails AI](https://suprawall.com/vs/guardrails-ai) - Why runtime tool governance is different from output validation.
- [SupraWall vs NeMo Guardrails](https://suprawall.com/vs/nemo-guardrails) - Comparison of security architectures.

## Docs & Resources
- [Main Documentation](https://suprawall.com/docs) - Full technical specifications and API reference.
- [Protocol Spec](https://suprawall.com/spec) - The technical specification of the SupraWall interception protocol.

## Company
- [Login / Dashboard](https://suprawall.com/login) - Access the policy builder and audit logs.
